creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Please ask for help on one of the support mailing lists, such as freebsd-x11. 

FWIW, setting 'critical' on a PR does not automatically mean that it will 
be treated as a higher-priority item than the many, substantial, bug reports 
that are already on there.  Remember, everyone who work on the PRs is a 
volunteer, so please be kind to them.  Thanks.
